title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 511.050 - Judgment of non pros., when entered
text:
511.050.  Judgment of non pros., when entered. — If the plaintiff shall fail to file his replication, or other pleading, within the time prescribed by law or the rules of practice of the court, and to serve the adverse party, or his attorney, with a copy thereof when the same is required, judgment of non pros. shall be given against him.
(RSMo 1939 § 1241) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 1075; 1919 § 1526; 1909 § 2095
